title: malapoenna nitens
intro: Malapoenna nitens, also known as the 'Night-blooming Harebell', is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Malapoenna nitens has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Malapoenna nitens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
